title: Artifact Transformation Registry
description: Known artifact type conversions for pipeline composition. Maps source types to target types with execution method and fidelity metadata.

source.description: Source artifact type (exact or prefix wildcard, e.g., network.*).

lossy.description: Deprecated: use fidelity instead. If present, auto-converted: lossy=true → fidelity.score=0.0, lossy=false → fidelity.score=1.0.

fidelity.description: Structured fidelity metadata for this transform.

loss_type.description: Kind of degradation this transform introduces.

structural.description: Preservation of data structure (format, schema, nesting).

degradation_notes.description: Human-readable description of what information is lost.

converter_tool.description: Optional tool namespace to perform the conversion.

command_template.description: Shell command template using {input} and {output} placeholders.
